title: O Segredo Dos Djinn 2
overview: Paulo Constantino in O Segredo Dos Djinn 2 (2025)  A team of archaeologists return to the mountains of Kaf and find a medallion, which will cause the Guardian of Wishes to return to our world, to take his revenge on the ones who imprisoned him.
